description: The black_friday dataset is designed for regression tasks, focusing on customer purchases during Black Friday. It provides insights into consumer behavior by analyzing various demographic and product-related features to predict the purchase amount.

attribute_introduction.Gender: The gender of the customer, indicating whether the customer is male or female.
attribute_introduction.Age: The age range of the customer, categorized into different age groups.
attribute_introduction.Occupation: The occupation code of the customer, representing different job categories.
attribute_introduction.City_Category: The category of the city where the customer resides, indicating urban, semi-urban, or rural areas.
attribute_introduction.Stay_In_Current_City_Years: The number of years the customer has stayed in the current city.
attribute_introduction.Marital_Status: The marital status of the customer, indicating whether the customer is married or not.
attribute_introduction.Product_Category_1: The category code of the first product purchased by the customer.
attribute_introduction.Product_Category_2: The category code of the second product purchased by the customer, if applicable.
attribute_introduction.Product_Category_3: The category code of the third product purchased by the customer, if applicable.
attribute_introduction.Purchase: The purchase amount, which is the target variable to be predicted.
